experiences.strategy: Differentiable refractive deflectometry reproduction strategy: (1) Implement geometric optics ray tracing with Snell's law for refractive surfaces, (2) Set up dual-camera deflectometry geometry with screen-camera-lens configuration, (3) Implement theta-only optimization as baseline (optimize curvatures assuming perfect alignment), (4) Implement joint self-calibration (optimize curvatures + pose simultaneously), (5) Use Levenberg-Marquardt via scipy.optimize.least_squares, (6) Compare cost functions to verify >1 order of magnitude improvement. Key: the Jacobian is computed analytically through the differentiable ray tracing pipeline.
experiences.key_insight: For differentiable optics papers, the core challenge is implementing the forward model (ray tracing + Snell's law) in a differentiable way. Using scipy.optimize.least_squares with analytical Jacobians is more robust than autograd-based approaches for this type of problem.
